prompt: Build a landing page for an artisan coffee roaster called Ember & Oak.

assertions.name: non-default-fonts
assertions.description: Uses fonts other than Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Poppins, Montserrat, DM Sans, Lato, Nunito

assertions.name: no-generic-copy
assertions.description: No instances of 'Welcome to', 'Transform your', 'Seamless', 'Cutting-edge', 'Solutions for' in headlines

assertions.name: has-atmosphere
assertions.description: Uses gradients, textures, grain, shadows, or visual depth beyond flat solid colors

assertions.name: specific-color-palette
assertions.description: Uses a coherent brand-specific color palette (not just grey/blue defaults)

assertions.name: brand-specific-identity
assertions.description: Design feels specific to an artisan coffee brand, not a generic business template
